'''竏嗔-ch-r-g''' ('''kapachregoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loff|loff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loff|loff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗔-ch-r-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapachregoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipachregoko|thipachregoko]] || [[word:jipachregoko|jipachregoko]] || [[word:shipachregoko|shipachregoko]] || [[word:kipachregoko|kipachregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupachregoko|thuthupachregoko]] || [[word:jujupachregoko|jujupachregoko]] || [[word:shushupachregoko|shushupachregoko]] || [[word:kukupachregoko|kukupachregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupachregoko|thupachregoko]] || [[word:jupachregoko|jupachregoko]] || [[word:shupachregoko|shupachregoko]] || [[word:kupachregoko|kupachregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupachregoko|thupachregoko]] || [[word:jupachregoko|jupachregoko]] || [[word:shupachregoko|shupachregoko]] || [[word:kupachregoko|kupachregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepachregoko|thepachregoko]] || [[word:jepachregoko|jepachregoko]] || [[word:shepachregoko|shepachregoko]] || [[word:kepachregoko|kepachregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopachregoko|thothopachregoko]] || [[word:jojopachregoko|jojopachregoko]] || [[word:shoshopachregoko|shoshopachregoko]] || [[word:kokopachregoko|kokopachregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopachregoko|thopachregoko]] || [[word:jopachregoko|jopachregoko]] || [[word:shopachregoko|shopachregoko]] || [[word:kopachregoko|kopachregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopachregoko|thopachregoko]] || [[word:jopachregoko|jopachregoko]] || [[word:shopachregoko|shopachregoko]] || [[word:kopachregoko|kopachregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦpachregoko|thﾃｦpachregoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦpachregoko|jﾃｦpachregoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦpachregoko|shﾃｦpachregoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦpachregoko|kﾃｦpachregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapachregoko|thathapachregoko]] || [[word:jajapachregoko|jajapachregoko]] || [[word:shashapachregoko|shashapachregoko]] || [[word:kakapachregoko|kakapachregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapachregoko|thapachregoko]] || [[word:japachregoko|japachregoko]] || [[word:shapachregoko|shapachregoko]] || [[word:kapachregoko|kapachregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapachregoko|thapachregoko]] || [[word:japachregoko|japachregoko]] || [[word:shapachregoko|shapachregoko]] || [[word:kapachregoko|kapachregoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapachregithi|shapachregithi]] || [[word:shapachregiji|shapachregiji]] || [[word:shapachregishi|shapachregishi]] || [[word:shapachregiki|shapachregiki]]
